title: Department Manager Vacancy at Health & Glow - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Health & Glow - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Health & Glow in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Health & Glow:
Health & Glow is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Health & Glow!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
